questions.question: Describe the concept of distributed mutual exclusion in the context of coordination and agreement in distributed systems. (5 marks)
Explain how a distributed mutual exclusion algorithm can be used to control access to a shared resource in a distributed system. (10 marks)

What is the difference between a distributed mutex and a distributed semaphore in the context of coordination and agreement in distributed systems? Provide an example to illustrate your answer. (10 marks)
